Dros..Back: In these chest complaints, pains between the shoulders, pains in the back as if bruised from coughing.
Dros..Chest: Severe attacks of stitching in the chest when sneezing or coughing. He must press on the chest with the hand for relief. Makes an effort to hold chest with the hand when coughing, the cough is so violent. Compression of the chest, burning sensation in the chest, stitching pains in the chest.
Dros..Chill: Chill and chilliness and one-sided chill. Chill and fever with whooping cough. Chill and fever with inflammation of the larynx.
Dros..Extremities: Spasms of the extremities when coughing. Cramps in the extremities with the cough.
Dros..Extremities, coldness: Coldness in the bands and feet and blueness of the extremities.
Dros..Generalities: When we examine its spasmodic nature, its exhaustion, its cramps, which extend through a large number of complaints, we must realize that it is a more extensive remedy. Epileptiform spasms, prolonged sleeplessness, copious sweat on waking from sleep, restlessness and anxiety.

Dros..Head: Lancinating pains in various parts of the body, especially in the head, and must support the head with the hands.
Dros..Mind: imagines that he is constantly persecuted. Anxiety, sleeplessness, and fear of ghosts. Fear of being alone and suspicious of his most intimate friends. Confusion of mind and much dizziness.
Dros..Respiration: Spasmodic difficulties of the chest and larynx cause difficult breathing and suffocation. Asthmatic breathing from talking and constriction in the larynx.
Dros..Respiration, difficult: Difficult breathing especially on waking. Not able to utter a sound. Difficult breathing and suffocating sensation. Sensation as of something in the chest preventing breathing when talking or coughing. Difficult breathing and cough coming after midnight.
Dros..Skin: Corrosive itching in various parts of the body with measles-like eruptions.
Dros..Stomach: Nausea and vomiting. Vomiting of blood and bile in the morning and vomiting of mucus, and food when coughing. Coughing until he retches and vomits.
Dros..Stomach, pain: Constricting pains in the pit of the stomach.
Dros..Abdomen, pain: Constricting pains in the sides of the abdomen. Colic after sour food.
Dros..Generalities, pain: Lancinating pains in various parts of the body, especially in the head, and must support the head with the hands. Stitching pains will be found in many complaints.
Dros..Generalities, pressure: Must support the chest when coughing. Must press upon the abdomen. He must press on the chest with the hand for relief.
Dros..Clinical: It is one of the most frequently indicated remedies for measles. It is a very useful remedy in chronic bronchitis with spasmodic cough. It is a great palliative for the spasmodic cough that occurs in consumption and all along the course of tuberculosis of the lungs.
